Hi, @rbhaddad 

Please provide a signature for the latest commit sha: `538e8fd2d9b4f1474ae18916b88bdf37e6d69416` which must be signed with the owner wallet address: 
`erd152ayqle8qdt5uy0ueheyyd2u64kerzlt5xxwhvufya7ze5vw6z4slf90gt`

Feel free to use the Sign Message feature from the Utils dApp and paste the signature here in a comment: https://utils.multiversx.com/

Step-by-step guide:

Step 1: Copy latest commit sha
Step 2: Open: https://utils.multiversx.com/
Step 3: Log in with your owner address wallet
Step 4: Click the 'Sign Message' feature
Step 5: Paste the commit sha in the first column and hit sign
Step 6: Copy-paste the provided output signature here in a new comment

Thanks.

VibeOX Stream Manager
Hello, I will forward this to the xPortal team and get back to you once I have an update.

Your token will appear in xPortal if it's in your wallet balance. Do you have have it in your balance? 

It will also show up in the swap section once it's listed on xExchange or AshSwap.
